untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Eve & Eve double top' requires detection of two rounded peaks with specific morphology (shape, valley separation, ~3% price variation between peaks, volume comparison across 2-day windows around each peak high). These geometric and comparative volume conditions cannot be expressed using only the available point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, Bollinger Bands, etc.). The pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis and peak-detection logic that is outside the scope of single-bar indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the SHORT bias and breakout confirmation (close below pivot as proxy for 'confirmation line'), with exit on mean reversion. However, the core pattern detection—two rounded tops, valley separation, 3% variance tolerance, and relative volume comparison—requires custom pattern-matching logic not available in the indicator set. Manual review recommended for pattern-specific rule implementation.
